subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Asdaq! Hearken unto the Call from My hallowed Kingdom: verily, there is none other God but Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن اسمی الاصدق ان استمع الندآء من ملکوتی المقدس انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
